Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

refactor: cache declaration dependencies and merge inline import collector (#4)

- Introduce `ModuleDeps` struct to group declaration dependencies with
  inline import references
- Pre-compute declaration dependencies before the fixpoint loop and cache
  them per module, avoiding redundant AST walks on every iteration
- Merge `InlineImportCollector` back into `RootReferenceCollector` since
  both walk the same statements
- Extract `apply_inline_imports` helper for processing inline import
  references from cached deps
- Replace `collect_referenced_root_symbols_in_declarations` with direct
  Scoping queries (check which root symbols have resolved references)

commit.message:
Fix broken prompt strings that caused empty site

Three activity prompt strings (#2, #8, #49) contained literal newlines
instead of \n escape sequences, breaking the entire script block.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add training data bridge for Qwen 2.5 + update train_v5.py target model

- Rewrite prepare_v5_data.py: loads all 5,596 pairs (JSONL + 560 batch files),
  deduplicates, quality-filters, classifies thinking pairs into 4 curriculum
  phases, enforces 72/28 direct/thinking mix, Hive 2x oversample, interleaves
  thinking pairs throughout. Exports 6,176 curriculum-ordered pairs as v5.jsonl
- Update train_v5.py: target Qwen 2.5 Coder 7B (was Qwen 3.5 9B), update all
  model references, HF/Unsloth paths, internal class names, VRAM comments
- Update README: v5 status, training pipeline docs, roadmap
- Add 3 thinking-trace batch files (p786, p788, p789)

🔗 Bridge review→deploy pipeline gap with project-approval aggregation

skill for zero-tolerance audit reporting.

commit.message:
Fix student assessment submit: restore userAssessment on resume

The submit handler silently returned when userAssessment was null.
This happened because fetchAssessment() never called setUserAssessment()
when resuming an in-progress attempt. Also fixed reading the flat API
response (was incorrectly accessing .assessment sub-key).

Now restores userAssessment, savedAnswers, and lastQuestionIndex from
the questions API response when an active attempt exists.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

視線チェック（LOS）の精度を大幅改善

- サンプル点を10固定→近距離20m間隔+遠距離100m間隔（最大50点）に増加
- 周辺約20m以内の建物も検出する近傍検索を追加
- 花火高度を直径に応じたパラメータに統一
- 観覧者の直前の建物を見逃す問題を解消

feat(telegram): redesign connect flow with signed params and login widget (#3816)

* feat(telegram): redesign connect flow with signed params and login widget

Replace pending link mechanism with HMAC-SHA256 signed connect params for
the /connect command and add Telegram Login Widget popup for account
linking from the settings page.

- Add signed connect params (connect-token.ts) for secure /connect flow
- Add Telegram Login Widget popup auth with postMessage listener
- Add auth-callback relay page for Telegram OAuth popup
- Split disconnect/uninstall actions on settings page
- Send success message to user in Telegram after linking
- Use tg:// protocol handler for native app opening
- Return 409 for existing bot registrations

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor(telegram): replace connect callout with card section and add domain copy

Move connect account UI from blue callout banner to a card-style section
matching the disconnect layout. Add /setdomain domain copy-to-clipboard
in the bot info section.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor(telegram): move domain copy info to connect section with clear instructions

Move /setdomain domain copy from bot info to the connect account section
where it's contextually relevant, with step-by-step instructions for
configuring the bot domain in @BotFather.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor(telegram): simplify connect section to single-row layout

Match the same layout as disconnect/uninstall sections with description
on the left and action button on the right. Inline the /setdomain domain
copy hint into the description text.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(telegram): update connect section copy

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* style(telegram): highlight setdomain hint in amber

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(telegram): strip port from oauth origin for domain validation

Telegram /setdomain only accepts bare domains without ports. Use
hostname (not host) for the OAuth origin param and the displayed
domain to copy. return_to still uses the full origin with port.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(telegram): use full origin for oauth to fix postmessage delivery

Telegram validates domain by hostname (ignoring port) when /setdomain
is configured. Using the full origin (with port) ensures the
postMessage targetOrigin matches the opener window origin.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(telegram): detect domain configuration and show hint conditionally

Probe oauth.telegram.org server-side to check if the bot domain is
configured in BotFather. Only show the /setdomain hint when domain
is not configured.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(telegram): multi-step install -> connect -> success flow

Keep user on /telegram/connect page through the entire flow instead of
navigating to /settings/telegram after registration. The wizard now
progresses through three steps: Install Bot, Connect Account, and
Success (auto-opens Telegram).

- Extract shared telegram-auth-parser and check-domain utilities
- Add domainConfigured to register API response
- Extend connect state machine with step field and OAuth listener
- Detect existing installation on page refresh to restore correct step
- Add click-to-copy for domain hint on connect-account step

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: use timing-safe comparison for hmac verification and remove type assertions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(telegram): address pr review findings

- Extract shared popup utility to eliminate duplication (P1-2)
- Extract Telegram OAuth URL constant (P1-3)
- Add error logging to domain probe catch block (P1-1)
- Add tests for verify-login and connect-token crypto modules (P1-4)
- Add DELETE /api/integrations/telegram/link tests (P2)
- Remove unnecessary typeof window guard (P2)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(telegram): address second round pr review findings

- Add POST link happy path tests for telegramAuth and connectSignature
- Add POST link tests for invalid auth hash and invalid signature
- Replace vi.useFakeTimers with vi.spyOn(Date, 'now') in crypto tests
- Use window.open instead of window.location.href for tg:// protocol
- Fix success page tests to match actual component text and behavior

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add HTTP-based migration and seeding scripts for Neon (#57)

* feat: add HTTP-based migration and seed scripts for Neon setup

Since TCP port 5432 is blocked in some environments (CI sandboxes),
these scripts use the Neon HTTP SQL endpoint instead of a direct
Postgres connection.

- scripts/migrate.py: runs all Prisma migrations via Neon HTTP API
  (handles dollar-quoted DO $$ blocks, idempotent via _prisma_migrations)
- scripts/seed-campuses-http.py: seeds the 25-campus catalog (24 campus + 1 online)
- scripts/seed-public-http.py: creates and seeds public recalc_* tables
  (recalc_base_json, recalc_regla_beca, recalc_meta, recalc_plantel, etc.)

Neon project: scholarship-recalc (damp-sound-05024496)
Region: aws-us-east-1

https://claude.ai/code/session_01C5X9kuNvUQofXrbGsjYtQm

* chore: add intermediate HTTP migration scripts (curl and mjs variants)

Alternative migration runners used during initial setup when the
Python-based migrate.py was being developed.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01C5X9kuNvUQofXrbGsjYtQm

* fix: update scripts to use correct Neon project (ep-purple-mode-ai98seg3)

The initial setup used a newly created project. This updates all migration
and seed scripts to connect to the correct existing Neon project that has
Neon Auth configured.

Also re-ran migrations and seeds on the correct database:
- 10 migrations applied (14 tables in recalc_admin schema)
- 25 campuses seeded (24 presencial + 1 online)
- 252 scholarship rules + 245 regreso materias rows seeded

https://claude.ai/code/session_01C5X9kuNvUQofXrbGsjYtQm

commit.message:
fix: use npm run build and --include=dev for Omniclaw compile

typescript is a devDependency in omniclaw. The base image sets
NODE_ENV=production which causes npm install to skip devDeps.
Using --include=dev ensures tsc is available, and npm run build
uses the project's own build script instead of npx resolving to
the wrong tsc package.

npm package for direct database access instead of Supabase JS client.

- Add ON/OFF toggle to ScheduleOverridePanel (disables all overrides
  in DB when turned off, scheduler falls back to auto mode)

明細行削除ボタンを固定幅divで囲みレイアウト安定化

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: Quran completion celebration modal + khatm dashboard banner

When a user completes all 30 juz, a one-time bottom-sheet modal
celebrates the achievement with the Quran khatm du'a in Arabic,
transliteration, and translation — then gently transitions into a
Tadabbur (pondering) teaser with the coming-soon Surah Reflection
badge. The modal fires once per Ramadan year (localStorage guard
keyed by year) and correctly handles all completion paths: grid tap,
reader completion + Back, and component remount after reader mode.

The Dashboard also gains a persistent "Khatm complete" card below
the progress ring whenever completedCount === 30, replacing the
catch-up banner for users who've finished the Quran.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: 광주 남구 지역 코드 매핑 버그 수정

- "광주 남구" → 24030 직접 매핑 추가 (이전에 누락됨)
- isRegionCode() 정규식 개선: \d{2,5} → \d{2}|\d{5}
  * 2자리(시/도) 또는 5자리(시/군/구) 코드만 유효하도록 수정
  * 3자리, 4자리 코드는 거부 (예: 680)

RegionCodeMapperTest.java 추가:
- 광주 남구, 부산 남구, 대구 남구, 울산 남구 매핑 검증
- 강남구, 종로구, 광산구 매핑 검증
- isRegionCode() 정규식 검증

테스트 결과:
- ✅ "광주 남구" → 24030 (올바른 매핑)

commit.message:
Initial commit: AI agent learning project

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: Grafana PG backend, Hubble observability, NetworkPolicy removal, CNPG dashboard

Major changes across multiple subsystems:

- Grafana PostgreSQL backend (CNPG): 3-instance cluster in database namespace,
  ExternalSecrets for Vault credential sync, deploy-monitoring.sh Phase 3 setup,
  VolumeAutoscaler for PVC auto-expansion. Fixes session loss with HPA scaling.

- Hubble observability: RKE2 Cilium HelmChartConfig enabling metrics/relay/UI,
  Alloy flow log collection, ServiceMonitor, OAuth2-proxy, Grafana dashboards.

- NetworkPolicy removal: All custom NetworkPolicies removed from codebase and
  deploy scripts. Were blocking CNPG operator communication during rolling
  upgrades causing replica creation failures.

- CNPG dashboard: Per-pod dropdown using pod labels (added to scrape config),
  fixed connection usage join queries, proper aggregation in "All" mode.

- Traefik dashboard: OAuth2-proxy protected dashboard with ExternalSecret.

- Keycloak setup: Updated eso-monitoring Vault policy for Grafana PG credentials,
  added Hubble UI OIDC client.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(e2e): add visual regression tests

Tests pages at multiple viewports:
- Homepage (desktop 1280px, mobile 375px)
- Work with us page
- Blog post
- Projects list
- Header and footer components

Additional checks:
- Color scheme respect (light mode)
- Reduced motion preference
- Responsive breakpoints (375-1536px)
- No horizontal scroll at any breakpoint
- CTA visibility above fold
- H1 visibility on all pages

Uses Playwright screenshot comparison with 0.1% diff threshold.
Run `npx playwright test --update-snapshots` to update baselines.

Part of Phase 19.3.7: E2E Visual Regression (bd-3l1)

commit.message:
feat(snapshots): Add snapshot upload task (#1091)

* feat(snapshots): Add snapshot upload task

Add a new `sentryUploadSnapshots` task that uploads snapshots to Sentry
via `sentry-cli build snapshots`. The task is registered when the user
configures a snapshots path via the new `sentry.snapshots` extension
block.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(snapshots): Wire telemetry provider for snapshot uploads

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor(snapshots): Remove afterEvaluate and isPresent check

Register the task unconditionally and let the lazy DirectoryProperty
handle resolution at execution time.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(snapshots): Add required --app-id argument

sentry-cli build snapshots requires --app-id. Add it as a required
property on the SnapshotsExtension.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: Add changelog entry for snapshot uploads

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor(snapshots): Simplify task registration API

Move all wiring logic into the task's register() method so the plugin
call site only passes project, extension, and org/project overrides.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* style: Apply spotless formatting

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor(snapshots): Wire telemetry and sentry properties properly

Add proper telemetry setup via configureTelemetryNoVariant, wire
sentryProperties file, and pass buildEvents and cliExecutable to the
register method. Remove unused GradleInternal import.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(snapshots): Make variant nullable in getPropertiesFilePath

The snapshot upload task has no variant context, so variant needs to
be optional when resolving the sentry.properties file path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor(snapshots): Remove telemetry from snapshot uploads

Telemetry wiring is not needed for the snapshot upload task.
Remove the unused buildEvents parameter and the
configureTelemetryNoVariant helper function.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(snapshots): Skip buildType paths when variant is null

When variant is null (e.g. snapshot uploads), buildTypeName resolves
to an empty string, producing nonsensical paths with double separators
like src//sentry.properties. Guard buildTypeName-based paths the same
way flavorName-based paths are already guarded.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* test(snapshots): Add tests for null variant property lookup

Verify that getPropertiesFilePath with a null variant finds files in
the project root and does not search buildType-specific paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix force import correctly repairing zero-placeholder statistics entries

When the API only has the current billing period and an existing correct history
is already in the recorder, the previous force-import path would have re-imported
valid rows starting from 0, creating negative changes against older correct entries.

New logic for initial_import=True when running_total < sensor_state:
- Query get_last_statistics to detect whether correct statistics already exist.
- If existing_last_sum > running_total: existing stats are correct — only overwrite
  the zero-value open-month placeholder entry (if present) with sensor_state_value.
  All other months are left untouched.
- If no existing stats: import valid rows with a baseline offset anchored to
  sensor_state, plus a placeholder repair entry when present.

Imports get_last_statistics / recorder get_instance with graceful fallback for
HA versions that don't expose these symbols.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(frontier): remove leftover grpc-gateway annotations from PAT model (#445)

The CreateCurrentUserPAT PR (#443) was merged with openapiv2 annotations
that were removed in #444. This cleans up the remaining annotations.

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: phone autofill — use autocomplete=tel, remove maxLength truncation

tel-local caused browser to insert only subscriber number (49515) without
mobile prefix. Changed to tel so full number is inserted, then JS strips
the +370 prefix. Removed maxLength=8 which truncated autofill before
onChange could process it.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add PIN, biometric authentication, and AES-GCM encryption

- PIN lock with SHA-256 hashed storage and numeric keypad UI
- Biometric auth (Face ID/Touch ID) via LocalAuthentication
- Auto-lock with configurable timeout (immediate to never)
- Lock screen overlay with PIN entry and biometric unlock
- AES-GCM encryption manager with Keychain-stored DEK
- Scene phase monitoring for auto-lock on background/foreground

Fix C# behavior pipeline: assembly collision + mob name prefix mismatch

Each .cs file now compiles to a unique assembly name instead of all sharing
"CommunityBehaviors". DungeonsController now rewrites mob/item names in C#
behavior code to match prefixed XML ids at approval time. Fixed all existing
.cs files with correct prefixed names.
